title: push fails on attempt to read non-existent and unnecessary certs file
body:
`docker-registry.default.svc:5000` is marked as insecure (as you can see from the logs), yet the push fails when buildah attempts to read the non-existent cert file `/etc/docker/certs.d/docker-registry.default.svc:5000/node-client-ca.crt`

unclear what would lead it to expect such a file.


```
2018-10-02T18:56:01.2004833Z Pushing image docker-registry.default.svc:5000/e2e-test-build-timing-nmw6s/test:latest ...
2018-10-02T18:56:01.200509741Z Pushing image "docker-registry.default.svc:5000/e2e-test-build-timing-nmw6s/test:latest" from local storage.
2018-10-02T18:56:01.200580203Z Setting authentication secret for "".
2018-10-02T18:56:01.200589582Z Registry "docker-registry.default.svc:5000" is marked as insecure in the registries configuration.
2018-10-02T18:56:01.200874148Z time="2018-10-02T18:56:01Z" level=debug msg="parsed reference into \"[overlay@/var/lib/containers/storage+/var/run/containers/storage:overlay.skip_mount_home=false,overlay.mountopt=nodev,overlay.override_kernel_check=false]docker-registry.default.svc:5000/e2e-test-build-timing-nmw6s/test:latest\""
2018-10-02T18:56:01.200885306Z time="2018-10-02T18:56:01Z" level=debug msg="Using registries.d directory /etc/containers/registries.d for sigstore configuration"
2018-10-02T18:56:01.200914073Z time="2018-10-02T18:56:01Z" level=debug msg=" No signature storage configuration found for docker-registry.default.svc:5000/e2e-test-build-timing-nmw6s/test:latest"
2018-10-02T18:56:01.200961477Z time="2018-10-02T18:56:01Z" level=debug msg="Looking for TLS certificates and private keys in /etc/docker/certs.d/docker-registry.default.svc:5000"
2018-10-02T18:56:01.290080909Z time="2018-10-02T18:56:01Z" level=debug msg=" crt: /etc/docker/certs.d/docker-registry.default.svc:5000/node-client-ca.crt"
2018-10-02T18:56:01.412104074Z Registry server Address: 
2018-10-02T18:56:01.4121371Z Registry server User Name: serviceaccount
2018-10-02T18:56:01.412141643Z Registry server Email: serviceaccount@example.org
2018-10-02T18:56:01.412145503Z Registry server Password: <<non-empty>>
2018-10-02T18:56:01.463726634Z F1002 18:56:01.463561       1 helpers.go:119] error: build error: Failed to push image: error copying layers and metadata: Error initializing destination docker://docker-registry.default.svc:5000/e2e-test-build-timing-nmw6s/test:latest: open /etc/docker/certs.d/docker-registry.default.svc:5000/node-client-ca.crt: no such file or directory
```

comments.body: @ypu Could you check this out and make a test for it?

@vrothberg I think your insecure registries work may have at least partially addressed this.  If you've a few cycles, could you take a looksee?  If possible we should get this closed out by Friday 1/11/19

> @vrothberg I think your insecure registries work may have at least partially addressed this. If you've a few cycles, could you take a looksee? If possible we should get this closed out by Friday 1/11/19

Pushing to insecure registries works - just tested today :-) So we can close it. Thanks for the ping, @TomSweeneyRedHat !
